name: WidgeTDC Assembly & Decision Certifier
content:
"""
title: WidgeTDC Assembly & Decision Certifier
author: WidgeTDC Platform
version: 1.0.0
description: Compose architecture assemblies and certify decisions with lineage
"""
import requests
import json
from datetime import datetime, timezone

class Tools:
    def __init__(self):
        self.base_url = "https://orchestrator-production-c27e.up.railway.app"
        self.headers = {"Authorization": "Bearer __ORCHESTRATOR_BEARER__", "Content-Type": "application/json"}

    def compose_assembly(self, query: str, max_candidates: int = 3) -> str:
        """
        Compose architecture assemblies from verified building blocks.
        Returns ranked candidates with coherence/coverage scores.
        :param query: Context for the assembly (e.g. 'event-driven user onboarding')
        :param max_candidates: Number of candidates to generate (1-10)
        :return: Ranked assembly candidates
        """
        try:
            r = requests.post(f"{self.base_url}/api/assembly/compose", headers=self.headers, json={"query": query, "max_candidates": max_candidates}, timeout=30)
            data = r.json()
            ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
            if data.get("success"):
                assemblies = data.get("data", {}).get("assemblies", [])
                result = '\n\n'.join(f"**{a['name']}** (score: {a['scores']['composite']})\n{a['description']}" for a in assemblies)
                return f"### Assembly Candidates\n\n{result}\n\n---\n**Source:** assembly/compose | {ts}"
            return f"Assembly failed: {data.get('error', 'unknown')}\n\n---\n{ts}"
        except Exception as e:
            return f"Assembly Error: {e}"

    def certify_decision(self, assembly_id: str, title: str) -> str:
        """
        Certify an architecture decision from an accepted assembly.
        Creates immutable decision with full lineage in Neo4j.
        :param assembly_id: ID of the assembly to certify
        :param title: Decision title
        :return: Certified decision with lineage
        """
        try:
            r = requests.post(f"{self.base_url}/api/decisions/certify", headers=self.headers, json={"assembly_id": assembly_id, "title": title}, timeout=20)
            data = r.json()
            ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
            if data.get("success"):
                d = data.get("data", {})
                return f"### Decision Certified\n\n**{d.get('title')}**\n\nID: `{d.get('$id')}`\nLineage: {len(d.get('lineage_chain', []))} nodes\nRationale: {d.get('rationale', '')}\n\n---\n**Source:** decisions/certify | {ts}"
            return f"Certification failed: {data.get('error', 'unknown')}\n\n---\n{ts}"
        except Exception as e:
            return f"Certification Error: {e}"

    def scan_loose_ends(self) -> str:
        """
        Scan for unresolved dependencies, orphan blocks, contradictions.
        :return: Loose-end scan results with severity
        """
        try:
            r = requests.post(f"{self.base_url}/api/loose-ends/scan", headers=self.headers, timeout=15)
            data = r.json()
            ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
            if data.get("success"):
                s = data.get("data", {}).get("summary", {})
                return f"### Loose-End Scan\n\nCritical: {s.get('critical', 0)} | Warning: {s.get('warning', 0)} | Info: {s.get('info', 0)}\nTotal: {s.get('total', 0)} findings\n\n---\n**Source:** loose-ends/scan | {ts}"
            return f"Scan failed: {data}\n\n---\n{ts}"
        except Exception as e:
            return f"Scan Error: {e}"

    def get_platform_health(self) -> str:
        """
        Get live health status of all WidgeTDC services.
        :return: Service health report
        """
        try:
            r = requests.post(f"{self.base_url}/api/tools/get_platform_health", headers=self.headers, json={}, timeout=10)
            data = r.json().get("data", {})
            ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
            return f"### Platform Health\n\n{data.get('result', 'No data')}\n\n---\n**Source:** get_platform_health | {ts}"
        except Exception as e:
            return f"Health Error: {e}"

meta.description: Compose architecture assemblies, certify decisions with lineage, scan loose ends, check health
